description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with a combination of flat and gable roofs, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a spacious driveway leading to a double garage. The exterior is finished in a mix of light-colored stucco and natural wood accents, giving it a contemporary yet inviting appearance. The front yard is landscaped with several mature trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. The structure includes multiple interconnected volumes, with the main entrance sheltered by a covered porch. The rear and side elevations showcase expansive glass panels, maximizing natural light and offering views of the surrounding landscape. The overall layout is open and airy, with a focus on blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern bungalow with flat and gable roofs, large windows, a double garage, and landscaped front yard with mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance with covered porch, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, rear landscaping, and the transition between stucco and wood finishes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple large windows, flat roof sections, and the open backyard area with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garage doors, additional trees, and the side elevation of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
